scripts.clean-db: npx supabase db reset || npx supabase start
scripts.dev: npx supabase status || npx supabase start
scripts.supabase:deploy: npx supabase link --project-ref $SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF --password $SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD && npx supabase db push
scripts.update-config: npx supabase stop --all --no-backup && npx supabase start
